name: Peter Pan: Hidden Objects
short_description: Join the captivating adventure through the Neverland and Peter Pan's hidden treasures! Discover magical locations, from the Lost Boys' hidden spot to the Jolly Roger. Peter Pan, Wendy and Tinker are waiting for you to conquer challenges and experience the timeless story like never before together!
detailed_description:
Join the captivating adventure through the Neverland and Peter Pan's hidden treasures! Discover magical locations, from the Lost Boys' hidden spot to the Jolly Roger. Seek out fairies who can tell you all of Neverland's mysteries. Peter Pan, Wendy and Tinker are waiting for you to conquer challenges and experience the timeless story like never before together!

Our features:
- You can choose between different sets of challenges for each location: searching for hidden objects, spotting the differences, finding by silhouette and puzzles.
- Build your collection. Go through scenes to try new quests and get more rewards!
- Bright and realistic scenes with your favourite characters!
- Original and captivating plot!

Good luck in your journey! Remember, hidden clues can be everywhere.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Dutch, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Ukrainian
